title: [CI:DOCS] Add some Readme updates around machine
body:
We really should be advertising our Mac and Windows support more prominently.

Next step will be to update the Mac/Windows tutorials (honestly, it's kind of a mess right now; there are 3 separate tutorials on Mac/the remote client, and none of them are complete) and link the result from the readme.

LGTM
and happy green test buttons
